UG-81  MATERIAL IDENTIFICATION. (a) All pressure-retaining materials shall be identified by the material manufacturer with the specification number, grade, and heat number, as required by the applicable material specification. (b) The vessel Manufacturer shall maintain traceability of all materials from the original mill test report through final installation. Identification marks shall be transferred before cutting in accordance with UCS-115. (c) Materials that cannot be identified shall not be used unless retested to satisfy the requirements of UG-80. Inspection of material identification shall be performed per UG-93. See also UG-84 for impact testing requirements on identified materials.
